2606.25651.title: MedGuards: Multi-Agent System for Reliable Medical Error Detection and Correction
2606.25651.paper_summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in healthcare settings, accurate error detection and correction in generated or existing text becomes critical, as even minor mistakes can pose risks to patient safety. Existing methods for error detection and correction, including automated checks and heuristic-based approaches, do not generalize well across unseen datasets. In this paper, we propose MedGuards as a medical safety guardrail, which is a new framework that treats medical error detection and correction as a multi-agent in-context learning task. Specialized agents separately detect, localize, and correct errors, while a confidence-guided arbitration mechanism resolves disagreements using reasoning traces and confidence scores. This design enhances interpretability, robustness, and adaptability, without requiring additional training of the base LLMs. Additionally, we introduce the Keyword-Prioritized Correction Score (KPCS), a new evaluation metric that considers whether critical keywords within the reference text are generated correctly, providing a more comprehensive assessment than conventional metrics. Experiments across four multilingual medical datasets consisting of clinical notes demonstrate significant improvements by the proposed framework across several metrics and models. Our aim is to enable safer deployment of LLMs in real-world healthcare applications. For reproducibility, we make our code publicly available at https://github.com/congboma/MedErrBench.
2606.25651.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）在醫療環境中的逐步應用，生成或現有文本中的準確錯誤檢測和修正變得至關重要，因為即使是微小的錯誤也可能對病人安全造成風險。現有的錯誤檢測和修正方法，包括自動檢查和基於啟發式的方法，無法在未見數據集上良好泛化。在本文中，我們提出了MedGuards作為醫療安全的護欄，這是一個新的框架，將醫療錯誤檢測和修正視為一個多代理的上下文學習任務。專門的代理分別檢測、定位和修正錯誤，而一個基於信心的仲裁機制則利用推理痕跡和信心分數來解決分歧。這種設計增強了可解釋性、穩健性和適應性，而無需對基礎LLMs進行額外訓練。此外，我們引入了關鍵詞優先修正分數（KPCS），這是一個新的評估指標，考慮參考文本中的關鍵詞是否正確生成，提供比傳統指標更全面的評估。在四個包含臨床筆記的多語言醫療數據集上的實驗顯示，所提出的框架在多個指標和模型上均有顯著改善。我們的目標是促進LLMs在現實醫療應用中的更安全部署。為了可重複性，我們將代碼公開於 https://github.com/congboma/MedErrBench。
2606.25651.author: Congbo Ma et.al.
2606.25651.authors: Congbo Ma, Hu Wang, Yichun Zhang, Farah E. Shamout
